title: Add AI Photo Editor Pro to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Fresh in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: AI Photo Editor Pro just landed in the community showcase. Time to give those pixels a fresh coat of paint with some AI magic.
gist.summary: Added AI Photo Editor Pro to the community apps showcase, providing a new tool for easy AI-powered photo editing.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use AI Photo Editor Pro directly from the community greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a photo editor/artist inside the community greenhouse. A retro monitor showing a photo being edited, surrounded by lush digital plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, holding a small glowing photograph inside a lush digital greenhouse. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays an image editing interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, holding a small glowing photograph inside a lush digital greenhouse. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays an image editing interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background.
